title: Remember Me Checkbox Persists Authenticated Session Across Browser Restart
description: Verifies that when the 'Remember Me' option is checked during login, the authenticated session persists after the browser is closed and reopened, allowing the user to access protected routes without re-authenticating.
expected_result: With 'Remember Me' checked, the user authenticates successfully and is redirected to /dashboard. Re-navigating to /dashboard does not trigger a redirect to /login, confirming the persistent session (long-lived cookie/token) was correctly established and is active.

test_steps.action: Enter valid email into the email field
Enter valid password into the password field
Click the Sign In button to authenticate
test_steps.expected: Loading indicator is shown during authentication

test_steps.action: Wait for successful redirect to the dashboard
test_steps.expected: User is redirected to /dashboard after successful authentication

test_steps.action: Verify the user is shown as authenticated on the dashboard
test_steps.expected: User avatar or display name is visible confirming active session

test_steps.action: Navigate directly back to /dashboard to simulate session persistence (cookie check)
test_steps.expected: User remains on /dashboard without being redirected to /login, confirming session persisted

test_steps.action: Verify authenticated user indicator is still visible after navigation
test_steps.expected: User avatar remains visible, confirming the session was not lost
